prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the current price of $166.10 and an estimated annualized volatility for PEP of approximately 14%. Assuming a log-normal distribution for price movements and a negligible mean return over a 7-day period, the standard deviation for 7 days was calculated using the square root of time rule. The confidence intervals show the probabilistic range of future prices based on this volatility.
